title: MCHDoc: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Reading Multi-Carrier Chinese Historical Documents
thumbnailAlt: MCHDoc historical document carriers and expert reading workflow
description: 15,724 high-resolution documents across six carriers, with page recognition, character recognition, and post-correction tasks.

title: EpiAgent: An Agent-Centric System for Ancient Inscription Restoration
thumbnailAlt: Qualitative comparison of restored ancient inscription samples
description: An agent-centric restoration system that coordinates multimodal analysis, experience-guided planning, specialized tools, and self-refinement.

title: Reproducing the Past: A Dataset for Benchmarking Inscription Restoration
description: A benchmark for Chinese inscription rubbing restoration, combining real degraded rubbings, paired synthetic data, and a global-local diffusion baseline.
